UserProgress.title: User Progress Data
UserProgress.description: Progress data, target marks, paper structures, and metrics for the tech blueprint.

data.description: A/L progress metadata containing sft, et, and ict subject data

ChatHistory.title: Chat History
ChatHistory.description: Stored chat interactions backlogged for the student helper

history.description: Array of thread parts represented by the AI

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of last progress save

BypassConfig.title: YouTube Bot Bypass Session
BypassConfig.description: Contains Netscape or typical key-value cookie settings for server download authentication to prevent Bot Block.

cookies.description: The custom youtube cookies text provided by the user

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Student profile containing their username, custom picture or design avatar, and a short learning bio.

Notification.title: User Push Notification
Notification.description: Stored push notifications representing new messages, friend requests, or system announcements.

/users/{userId}/progress/data.description: Path to student academic tracker data

/users/{userId}/bypass/config.description: Path to custom YouTube bypass cookies configuration

/users/{userId}/profile/info.description: Path to custom student profile info

/users/{userId}/notifications/{notificat.description: Path to individual user push notifications
